channel.title: OK on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in OK on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Canadian County Sheriff’s Office (OK)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Canadian County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: March 13, 2020 County: Canadian County State: OK FIPS: 40017

item.title: Blaine County, OK — USDA Distress Profile (3 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Blaine County, OK with 3 distress indicators:

energy-transition county (mining-dependent); losing population; low employment ratio

Full flags: Mining, Low Employment, Population Loss

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: nonmetro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition

item.title: Diamondback Corr Facility — Blaine, OK
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Diamondback Corr Facility in Blaine County, OK.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: DNI TREND JOINT VENTURES, LLC — ICE TULSA, OK $9,989,601
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: DNI TREND JOINT VENTURES, LLC Award ID: 70CMSW24C00000031 Amount: $9,989,601.00 Description: FISHBOWL TRAINING CENTER DESIGN BUILD Period: 2024-09-26 to 2026-03-25 Location: TULSA, OK (FIPS: 40143)
